disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: The hantavirus quarantine is over. Here’s what cruise passengers and scientists learned. - NBC News
updates.body_en: The hantavirus quarantine is over. Here’s what cruise passengers and scientists learned. NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮隔离结束，乘客和科学家总结教训。

updates.title_en: ‘It’s not science, it’s coercion’: health experts decry RFK Jr order on hantavirus quarantine - The Guardian
updates.body_en: ‘It’s not science, it’s coercion’: health experts decry RFK Jr order on hantavirus quarantine The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: 卫生专家批评RFK Jr关于汉坦病毒隔离的命令。

updates.title_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section.
updates.body_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section. facebook.com
updates.summary_zh: WHO称荷兰邮轮汉坦病毒隔离人员即将返家。

updates.title_en: Andes Virus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship: Current Situation | Hantavirus - Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
updates.body_en: Andes Virus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship: Current Situation | Hantavirus Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC发布邮轮上安第斯病毒疫情最新情况。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus ship passenger recounts 'huge shock' as quarantine nears end - Australian Broadcasting Corporation
updates.body_en: Hantavirus ship passenger recounts 'huge shock' as quarantine nears end Australian Broadcasting Corporation
updates.summary_zh: 澳大利亚广播公司报道邮轮乘客回忆隔离结束前的震惊。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. orders American exposed to hantavirus to stay quarantined against her will - USA Today
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders American exposed to hantavirus to stay quarantined against her will USA Today
updates.summary_zh: 美国RFK Jr.下令一名接触汉坦病毒的美国人强制隔离。

updates.title_en: Madrid's Gómez Ulla hospital discharges last hantavirus patient - Sur in English
updates.body_en: Madrid's Gómez Ulla hospital discharges last hantavirus patient Sur in English
updates.summary_zh: 马德里Gómez Ulla医院出院最后一名汉坦病毒患者。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise passenger says she’s being forced to quarantine in Nebraska - The Washington Post
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cruise passenger says she’s being forced to quarantine in Nebraska The Washington Post
updates.summary_zh: 华盛顿邮报报道邮轮乘客在内布拉斯加州被强制隔离。

updates.title_en: A federal medical reviewer said she could go home. RFK Jr. said no. - Healthbeat
updates.body_en: A federal medical reviewer said she could go home. RFK Jr. said no. Healthbeat
updates.summary_zh: 联邦医学审查员同意患者回家，但RFK Jr.拒绝。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. overrules experts to keep hantavirus cruise ship passenger in quarantine - The Independent
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. overrules experts to keep hantavirus cruise ship passenger in quarantine The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 美国 RFK Jr. 否决专家意见，维持汉坦病毒邮轮乘客隔离。

updates.title_en: RFK Jr. orders passenger from hantavirus-stricken cruise to remain in quarantine in Nebraska, despite CDC recommendation - CNN
updates.body_en: RFK Jr. orders passenger from hantavirus-stricken cruise to remain in quarantine in Nebraska, despite CDC recommendation CNN
updates.summary_zh: 美国 RFK Jr. 无视美国 CDC 建议，下令汉坦病毒邮轮乘客在内布拉斯加继续隔离。

updates.title_en: Countries Differ On Discharge Criteria For Andes Hantavirus Patients - Health Policy Watch
updates.body_en: Countries Differ On Discharge Criteria For Andes Hantavirus Patients Health Policy Watch
updates.summary_zh: 各国对安第斯汉坦病毒患者出院标准存在分歧。

updates.title_en: Kennedy Orders Woman to Stay in Hantavirus Quarantine, Despite C.D.C. Recommendation - The New York Times
updates.body_en: Kennedy Orders Woman to Stay in Hantavirus Quarantine, Despite C.D.C. Recommendation The New York Times
updates.summary_zh: 美国 Kennedy 不顾美国 CDC 建议，命令一名女性继续汉坦病毒隔离。

updates.title_en: Twenty-one countries launch coordinated Andes virus research initiative following hantavirus outbreak - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: Twenty-one countries launch coordinated Andes virus research initiative following hantavirus outbreak World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布21国启动安第斯病毒联合研究计划。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s Being Held ‘Hostage’ In Nebraska Quarantine (Latest Updates) - Forbes
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Cruise Passenger Says She’s Being Held ‘Hostage’ In Nebraska Quarantine (Latest Updates) Forbes
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客称在内布拉斯加隔离中被扣为人质。

updates.title_en: Defence Medics parachute into Tristan da Cunha to treat hantavirus patient - GOV.UK
updates.body_en: Defence Medics parachute into Tristan da Cunha to treat hantavirus patient GOV.UK
updates.summary_zh: 英国国防医疗队空降特里斯坦达库尼亚治疗汉坦病毒患者。
